resolved_facts: The filing-derived facts in WBI/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md are accepted as primary evidence.
disputed_facts: The valuation component ranges remain analyst judgments rather than reproduced facts.
unresolved_material_facts: Project-cohort invested capital, utilization and after-tax cash returns are not disclosed.
Customer-level MVC, dedication, renewal and termination economics are not disclosed.
Actual covenant headroom and a stressed sources-and-uses bridge are not disclosed.
